name: Prepare Publication-Ready False-Color Image with Scale Bar
description: Astronomers often need to transform raw linear FITS data into publication-ready false-color images. You are tasked with creating a public-outreach image of the Eagle Nebula's 'Pillars of Creation' using the raw Hubble Space Telescope H-alpha FITS image at `~/AstroImages/publication/eagle_halpha.fits`. Adjust the brightness and contrast to ensure both faint nebulosity and bright pillars are visible. Apply a false-color Lookup Table (LUT) such as 'Fire', 'Ice', or 'Royal'. Calibrate the image using the HST WFPC2 plate scale of 0.1 arcseconds per pixel and add a readable scale bar representing 60 arcseconds (1 arcminute). Export the final rendered image as a PNG to `~/AstroImages/publication/output/eagle_publication.png`.
